items.title: NASA is set to begin training with a prototype of Blue Origin's crew moon lander
items.summary: The space agency is planning to put astronauts on the moon in 2028.

items.title: Fintech startup Parker files for bankruptcy
items.summary: Parker, a well-funded startup offering corporate credit cards and banking services, has filed for bankruptcy and is widely reported to have shut down.

items.title: Mythos | Double-edged sword
items.summary: The Anthropic AI model can not only identify vulnerabilities in cyberspace that humans may have missed, but also generate ways to exploit them, potentially even for non-experts
